title: Conversational AI and Chatbots

modules.title: Natural Language Processing Basics
modules.sub: How machines read, interpret, and generate human language
modules.description: Learners explore the foundational techniques that enable AI systems to understand and process text and speech. They examine core NLP concepts such as tokenization, intent recognition, and entity extraction. By the end, learners can identify which NLP mechanisms power real-world conversational systems.

modules.title: Chatbot Design Principles
modules.sub: Building chatbot experiences that are clear, useful, and trustworthy
modules.description: Learners apply established design principles to plan effective chatbot interactions, including how to define scope, handle fallback scenarios, and set user expectations. They evaluate example chatbot flows and identify what makes them succeed or fail. The module equips professionals to make deliberate design decisions before a single line of code is written.

modules.title: Voice Assistants Technology
modules.sub: Understanding the systems behind spoken AI interactions
modules.description: Learners investigate how voice assistants convert speech to text, interpret intent, and generate spoken responses. They compare leading voice assistant platforms and assess their architectural trade-offs. This gives professionals a working mental model for evaluating and integrating voice-based AI solutions.

modules.title: Human-AI Conversation Design
modules.sub: Crafting dialogue flows that feel natural and keep users on track
modules.description: Learners design multi-turn conversation flows that balance efficiency with a natural, human-centered tone. They work through scenarios involving ambiguity, error recovery, and handoff to human agents. The module prepares professionals to produce conversation design artifacts — such as dialogue maps and persona guidelines — ready for team review.

synopsis: Understand how AI systems communicate with humans through text and speech. Learn principles for designing effective conversational AI experiences.
